label: Your daily brief — one voice for the whole garden
items: Every morning Rhozly now writes you a single ranked brief: what's overdue, what the weather means for today, watering suggestions from your sensors, harvest and pruning windows, anything your automations missed — and the good news too.
On Sage and Evergreen it's written by your AI head gardener (Evergreen gets our most capable model), honouring your garden's goals; every plan includes the same brief with clear, plain wording.
Tap any line to jump straight to it. Rate the brief 👍/👎 — and on Sage and Evergreen, tell it what to change and refresh it on the spot.
Your morning reminder now opens with the brief's headline, and you can ask the garden chat "what should I do today?" to hear it conversationally.
